title: Tokenization & Embedding Spaces
description: Analyze the impact of Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) on multi-lingual performance in LLMs. Master the geometric representation of tokens within high-dimensional vector spaces.
objectives: Analyze the impact of Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) on multi-lingual performance in LLMs.
Master the geometric representation of tokens within high-dimensional vector spaces.
